description_long: This modern bungalow features a sprawling L-shaped layout with a flat roof and large glass windows, creating a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. The main living area opens onto a private backyard with a swimming pool, surrounded by a manicured hedge and patio furniture. The exterior is finished in light-colored stucco with wood and metal accents, giving it a contemporary and minimalist appearance. Multiple sliding glass doors and expansive windows allow for abundant natural light and views of the landscaped garden. The property includes a driveway with a parked car and a small garden area with palm trees and shrubs. The overall design emphasizes open-plan living, outdoor leisure, and clean architectural lines.
description: A modern L-shaped bungalow with flat roofs, large glass windows, a private pool, and landscaped outdoor areas, finished in light stucco and wood accents.
description_view_0: This view highlights the side and rear of the bungalow, showing the pool area, patio, and a section of the garden with palm trees.
description_view_1: The front facade is visible, featuring the main entrance, driveway, and a row of hedges enclosing the pool and patio area.
description_view_2: This angle shows the opposite side, with the pool, patio furniture, and a clear view of the flat roof and upper story windows.
description_view_3: The rear and side of the bungalow are visible, emphasizing the outdoor living space, garden, and the arrangement of windows and doors.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
